title: Grastidium grossum
taxonomy: Grastidium grossum is classified as a species of moss in the family Grimmiaceae, which is a family of leafy bryophytes. This family is further grouped into the order Grimmiales, and the class Bryopsida, which is a subclass of mosses. The class Bryopsida is also known as the 'true mosses'. Grastidium grossum is native to tropical and subtropical regions. Its classification is consistent with other mosses in the Grimmiaceae family.
